all.critique: The analysis does not clarify how the external mask’s original shape (often [batch_size, L] for padding tokens) is broadcast or reshaped to match the causal mask’s dimensions (e.g. [batch_size, 1, L, L]) required by multi‐head attention. This detail is essential to ensure proper element-wise merging.

The reference to unchanged components (A through D) relies on previous analysis sections that are not provided here. This could leave parts of the model’s overall design underspecified for a reader who is not already familiar with the earlier documentation.
